title: Local AI vs Cloud: Why Your Excel Data Shouldn't Go To Azure! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that sensitive data in Excel should remain on-premises rather than sent to cloud services like Azure for AI integration. The recommendation emphasizes privacy preservation and risk avoidance through local model deployment.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof makes the case for keeping sensitive Excel data on-premises instead of routing it to cloud services like Azure for AI integration. The argument centers on privacy preservation and risk avoidance: local model deployment keeps the data in place rather than transmitting it to external infrastructure. The takeaway is that local inference is positioned as the safer default for confidential spreadsheet data.
